Валидные
2001:0db8:85a3:0000:0000:8a2e:0370:7334/64
2001:0db8:85a3:0000:0000:8a2e:0370:7334/128
2001:db8:85a3:0:0:8a2e:370:7334/32
::1/128
::/128
fe80::/10
2001:db8::/32
2001:db8:0:1::/64
2001:db8::1/64
fc00::/7
ff02::1/128
::ffff:192.168.1.1/96
2001:db8::/0
2001:db8::/127
ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff/128
0:0:0:0:0:0:0:0/64

Невалидные
192.168.1.1/24
10.0.0.1/8
8.8.8.8/32
:::/64
2001::db8::1/64
